command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kFLXQuFv4V4Y4E.cb116c6777a1 --database S72dXysLKGdD9WHAuQpZuU --execute 
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS bank_accounts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  bank VARCHAR(100),
  type ENUM('corrente','poupanca','carteira','investimento','outro') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'corrente',
  color VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT '#6366f1',
  icon VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'building-2',
  initialBalance DECIMAL(15,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(),
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

ALTER TABLE incomes ADD COLUMN bankAccountId INT NULL AFTER familyMemberId;
ALTER TABLE expenses ADD COLUMN bankAccountId INT NULL AFTER familyMemberId;
ALTER TABLE bills ADD COLUMN bankAccountId INT NULL AFTER familyMemberId;
